name: Date & Ginger Fans
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter, corn syrup, and chopped semisweet chocolate in a large bowl set over a pan of gently simmering water, stirring frequently until well blended.
2. Add the crushed Graham crackers, chopped pitted dates, and chopped preserved ginger to the chocolate mixture. Mix thoroughly.
3. Spread the mixture evenly into a 9-inch fluted flan pan with a removable bottom. Smooth the top with the back of a spoon.
4. Refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours, or until firm.
5. Carefully remove the side from the pan and cut the mixture into even-sized, wedge-shaped pieces.
6. Using a spatula, loosen the cookies from the base of the pan, sprinkle with powdered sugar, and arrange neatly on a serving plate.
7. Keep refrigerated, or in a cool place, until serving. Can be stored in an airtight container in a cool place for 2 to 3 days.
